title: End-to-End Release, Migration, Recovery, and TypeScript Engineering Defense · Independent Type Trial
summary: An independent museum program receives a different audience, command script, unknown JSON payload, cache age, async schedule, accessibility need, Node platform, and injected failure and transfers end-to-end release, migration, recovery, and typescript engineering defense into a changed defensible recoverable TypeScript Pokedex release dossier. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of defensible recoverable TypeScript Pokedex release dossier with automated and judgment…
objectives: Bind source, lockfile, compiler, tests, emitted JavaScript, packed artifact, command behavior, saved data, checksums, and stakeholder review to one revision.
Execute invalid input, not found, HTTP failure, malformed JSON, stale Promise, abort, cache corruption, write interruption, signal, and listener-leak cases.
Prove schema migration, old-package compatibility limits, backup, rollback, restored data identity, and support decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.instruction:
